items.query: Which hidden place did Sarah mention?

session_1.speaker: Mark
session_1.text: I finally visited the old library downtown.

session_1.speaker: Sarah
session_1.text: Behind it there is a hidden garden that stays quiet even on weekends.

metadata.conversation_text:
Mark said, "I finally visited the old library downtown."
Sarah said, "Behind it there is a hidden garden that stays quiet even on weekends."

session_summary.session_1_summary: Mark and Sarah discussed the old library and a hidden garden behind it.

items.query: What role did Priya take in the handoff?

session_2.speaker: Leo
session_2.text: I can prepare the rollout notes tonight.

session_2.speaker: Priya
session_2.text: Make me the checkpoint owner and I will receive the handoff packet tomorrow morning.

metadata.conversation_text:
Leo said, "I can prepare the rollout notes tonight."
Priya said, "Make me the checkpoint owner and I will receive the handoff packet tomorrow morning."

session_summary.session_2_summary: Leo and Priya discussed the rollout handoff, with Priya taking checkpoint ownership.
